text:
Author's Note

Translation

If God told me "I'll give you any one thing in this world of your choice", I'd immediately respond with
"THE LIBRARY OF CONGRESS".

Chapters Included

Chapter 74 "The Dwarf in the Flask" (フラスコの中の小人 Furasuku no Naka no Kobito)
Chapter 75 "The Last Days of Xerxes" (クセルクセス最期の日 Kuserukusesu Saigo no Hi)
Chapter 76 "Shape of a Person, Shape of a Stone" (人の形 石の形 Hito no Katachi: Ishi no Katachi)
Chapter 77 "The Tables Are Turned; A New Transmutation Circle" (逆転の錬成陣Gyakuten no Renseijin)
Chapter 78 "The Seven Deadly Sins" (七つの罪 Nanatsu no Tsumi)

Synopsis

From the back of the volume:

"Ed's clever plan to take out an enemy leaves him severely injured... Can he cheat death? One of our friends discovers the ironic secret behind Scar's brother's transmutation notes. And Major General Armstrong meets with the evil homunculus President Bradley. Whose side is she on again...? Plus, the disturbing origin of Ed and Al's immortal father finally revealed!"

Spine

Outside Cover

Father (in his initial form)

Inside Cover (In Memoriam)

King of Xerxes
Van Hohenheim's master
Everyone from Xerxes (There are too many of them)

Omake

Excerpt

"'23' sounds too cold. Why don't I give you a name, as thanks?"

"Who do you think you are, anyway?"

"Who cares? It'll be a great name. I promise. Lets see... Theo... Theofilatos Bombastus... Va-"

"Waaaay too long"

"Right, right. Your stupid. You won't be able to remember anything long."

"Quit calling me stupid!"

"Okay. Van... Van Hoenheim."

"Hmm... Van Hoenheim. I think I'll remember that."
